title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Compare the photographs and answer the questions.

tasks.instructions: Compare two of the pictures, and say what the benefits and concerns about automation in manufacturing might be and how it affects workers.

images.label: A
images.description: A fully automated car assembly line with robotic arms welding and assembling vehicles with no human workers visible in the immediate area

images.label: B
images.description: A worker monitoring a large automated packaging machine in a food factory, checking a screen of data while robots handle the physical work

images.label: C
images.description: A group of factory workers being retrained on new automated machinery, a trainer showing them how to operate a touch-screen control panel

followUp.question: Do you think automation in manufacturing is primarily a threat or an opportunity for workers? What is your reasoning?

tasks.instructions: Compare two of the pictures, and say what the potential benefits and drawbacks of artificial intelligence in the service sector might be.

images.label: D
images.description: A customer interacting with an AI-powered service robot in a hotel lobby, the robot providing directions and answering questions from a screen

images.label: E
images.description: A bank employee helping a customer at a desk, with a note on the wall advertising an AI chatbot service as an alternative

images.label: F
images.description: A person speaking with a virtual AI assistant on a smartphone, clearly asking for advice while sitting in a quiet café

followUp.question: Do you think AI customer service can ever fully replace human interaction, or are there situations where a human is always necessary?
